title: Write a base-and-step recursive sum/1
prompt: Write a `MyApp.Math.sum/1` function that takes a list of integers and returns their sum, implemented as explicit recursion with two clauses: a base clause matching `[]` that returns `0`, and a recursive clause matching `[head | tail]` that returns `head + sum(tail)`. Do NOT use `Enum.sum/1`, `Enum.reduce/3`, or a for comprehension. Output a complete `defmodule MyApp.Math do ... end`.
tier_rationale: Canonical recursion exercise. Base + step clauses are the textbook pattern.
